evals.prompt: quickbg this product photo and put the output next to it
evals.expected_output: Agent uses the rembg-based quickbg command, writes an explicit output path, and verifies the PNG exists.

evals.prompt: batch run quick bg on this folder locally, no api
evals.expected_output: Agent uses quickbg batch mode, not bgremove-api, and reports the output folder.

evals.prompt: is quickbg connected to my github repo?
evals.expected_output: Agent checks /Users/jack/Documents/GitHub/quickbg remotes and distinguishes it from bgremove-api.
